description: This watch from puma comes in a heavy duty design. The stylish dial and chunky casing gives this watch a tough appearance - perfect for navigating the urban jungle.Case diameter: 33 mmDial shape: OctogonalWarranty: 2 YearsStainless steel case in gold colourLeather straps with a tang claspBlack dial with branding near the 9 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for durability
